news.t: Should Investors Follow Private Equity into Life Sciences?
Novavax's 30% surge boosts biotech ETFs to best day in weeks

holdings.infoBox: BBC is an equity ETF with a total of 123 individual holdings. The top holdings are Erasca stock at 3.00%, Tango Therapeutics at 2.54%, Enliven Therapeutics at 2.10%, Spyre Therapeutics at 1.84%, and Oruka Therapeutics at 1.78%.

overview.description: The Virtus Biotech Clinical Trials ETF (BBC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund tracks an equally weighted index of US-listed biotech companies with lead drugs in various phases of clinical trials. BBC was launched on Dec 16, 2014 and is issued by Virtus Investment Partners.

data.title: Should Investors Follow Private Equity into Life Sciences?
data.text: Reflecting what it considers the vast potential of life sciences companies, Bain Capital is making another huge bet on the industry. The Boston-based investment firm has raised $1.9 billion in a new f...

data.title: Novavax's 30% surge boosts biotech ETFs to best day in weeks
data.text: Exchange-traded funds with exposure to biotech stocks rocketed higher Tuesday on hopeful news about treatments for COVID-19.

data.title: Failure to Launch: The ETF Built to Fight the Coronavirus That Never Came to Be
data.text: Bloomberg's Eric Balchunas and Scarlet Fu break down the Virtus LifeSci Biotech Clinical Trials ETF (ticker: BBC) with Paul Yook, CIO of LifeSci Venture Partners.

data.title: Best Growth ETFs for Q1 2020
data.text: The best Growth ETFs for Q1 2020 are XLK, BBC, and VGT.

data.title: Best Healthcare ETFs for Q1 2020
data.text: The best Healthcare ETFs for Q1 2020 are BBC, SBIO, and KURE.
